configured_mirror_result: All eight canonical SKILL.md bodies are byte-identical in both configured mirrors.

public_seed_policy.contract: Public defaults are copied from init assets at init time and are create-if-missing; they are not live reads of this repository's canonical tree.
public_seed_policy.release_boundary: root:dec-85 intentionally excludes release-mdkg-package from portable public defaults.
public_seed_policy.explicit_exact_equality: root:goal-74 required exact equality only for pursue-mdkg-goal while preserving the release skill absence.

history.fact: Five public seed bodies were mechanically synchronized with canonical skills and seed guardrails were added.
Canonical select, verify, and service-boundary skills and configured mirrors were later updated while assets/init was explicitly out of scope.
A later bounded goal required exact public equality for pursue-mdkg-goal only and preserved release-mdkg-package as repository-local.

guardrail_inventory.tests/commands/init.test.ts: asserts seeded membership and selected content, not a declared per-skill equality/divergence policy
guardrail_inventory.scripts/smoke-init.js: asserts initialized skill presence and selected behavior, not full currentness
guardrail_inventory.scripts/assert-publish-ready.js: asserts publication boundaries and required seed content, not full projection equality

findings.finding: Three public seed bodies diverge from canonical without a declared per-skill exact-versus-intentional-divergence contract, while existing checks cannot distinguish accepted snapshots from stale projections.
findings.recommended_control: Declare public membership and currentness mode per skill, then enforce exact hashes or an explicitly reviewed divergence marker.

findings.finding: Configured .agents and .claude mirrors are complete and byte-identical to all eight canonical skills.
